personal.name: Muhammad Afaq Umar
personal.title: Senior Backend Engineer
personal.summary: Senior Backend Engineer focused on payment systems, scalable backend architecture, and high-risk platforms where reliability and performance directly impact revenue.
personal.aboutExtended: I design, build, and own backend systems where failure is not an option — healthcare platforms, payment workflows, and large-scale file processing systems handling millions in transactions and thousands of daily users. I’ve led backend architecture for products like Prescription Hope and Veva Collect, taking full ownership from database design to cloud infrastructure.
personal.aboutClosing: I prefer working on complex problems involving scale, data integrity, and financial workflows, and I’m most effective in environments that value ownership, stability, and long-term system health.
personal.techLove: PHP, Laravel, Go, MySQL, AWS, Stripe, GraphQL, and building scalable, high-performance systems

projects.name: Prescription Hope
projects.description: Primary backend owner across multiple client platforms, specializing in payments, scalability, and system reliability.
highlights: Owned backend systems across employee and patient portals supporting $10M+ in monthly payments.
Designed and maintained recurring billing workflows using Stripe, USAePay, and Payroc.
Architected scalable database models with indexing and optimized queries for large patient datasets.
Implemented and maintained 20+ cron jobs handling billing, renewals, and operational automation.

projects.name: Veva Collect
projects.description: High-scale music collaboration platform used by major labels and Grammy-winning producers.
highlights: Led backend development handling ~5,000 file uploads per day with files up to 10GB.
Designed distributed file-processing pipelines using AWS S3, SQS, Lambda, Redis, and Go microservices.
Built async ZIP creation system to support 25GB+ multi-file shares without UX degradation.
Introduced load balancing and backend optimizations to prevent outages during heavy concurrent collaboration.

projects.name: Step2Compliance
highlights: Built AWS Lambda + SQS workflows triggering Laravel webhooks.
Developed Python automation for XLSM generation and syncing.

projects.name: RadioBridge
highlights: Developed analytics dashboards for IoT LoRaWAN data.
Worked on backend integrations and data pipelines.
Integrated Stripe payments and appointment scheduling systems.
Built ERP modules and Twilio SMS/video features.
Built ERP modules and led a small development team.
